nasb.text: The sons of Jehieli, Zetham and Joel his brother, had charge of the treasures of the house of the Lord.

esv.text: The sons of Jehieli, Zetham, and Joel his brother, were in charge of the treasuries of the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶希伊利的兒子西坦和他的兄弟約珥，掌管耶和華殿裡的庫房。

ccb.text: 耶希伊利的两个儿子西坦和约珥负责管理耶和华殿里的库房。
